19_60_1.NKJV: To the Chief Musician. Set to “Lily of the Testimony.” A Michtam of David. For teaching. When he fought against Mesopotamia and Syria of Zobah, and Joab returned and killed twelve thousand Edomites in the Valley of Salt. O God, You have cast us off; You have broken us down; You have been displeased; Oh, restore us again!

I earnestly search for you.
My soul thirsts for you;
my whole body longs for you
in this parched and weary land
where there is no water.

A psalm of David. When he was in the Wilderness of Judah. ⓙ [1] God, you are my God; I eagerly seek you.
I thirst for you;
my body faints for you
in a land that is dry, desolate, and without water. ⓚ
19_63_1.AMP:
A Psalm of David; when he was in the wilderness of Judah. O God, You are my God; with deepest longing I will seek You;
My soul [my life, my very self] thirsts for You, my flesh longs and sighs for You,
In a dry and weary land where there is no water.
19_63_1.MSG:
A David psalm, when he was out in the Judean wilderness.
God—you're my God!
I can't get enough of you!
I've worked up such hunger and thirst for God,
traveling across dry and weary deserts.
19_63_1.NIV:
Psalm 63
A psalm of David. When he was in the Desert of Judah.
O God, you are my God,
earnestly I seek you;
my soul thirsts for you,
my body longs for you,
in a dry and weary land
where there is no water.
19_63_1.NRSVCE:
O God, you are my God, I seek you,
my soul thirsts for you;
my flesh faints for you,

Shout with joy to God, all the earth!
19_66_1.NRSVCE: Make a joyful noise to God, all the earth;

19_66_2.NASB: Sing the glory of His name; Make His praise glorious.
19_66_2.NLT:
Sing about the glory of his name!
Tell the world how glorious he is.

19_66_2.CSB17:

19_66_2.NRSVCE:

I give thanks to God with everything I've got—
Wherever good people gather, and in the congregation.

Psalm 111

I will extol the Lord with all my heart
in the council of the upright and in the assembly.

I will give thanks to the LORD with my whole heart,
in the company of the upright, in the congregation.
